positive: A vibrant, stylized celestial forest meeting a cosmic ocean. The scene features towering, illuminated bioluminescent flora with abstract, swirling patterns, contrasted against deep indigo and cyan gradients. Central elements include stylized, glowing crystalline fauna (like stylized winged moths and miniature comets) drifting through the air. The overall composition should be symmetrical and highly detailed, emphasizing negative space and strong silhouettes against dramatic, ethereal volumetric lighting. Pop Art illustration style meets Art Nouveau elegance, suitable for screen printing on fabric. High contrast, deep saturation, perfect print quality.
negative: blurry, messy, text, watermark, logo, writing, artifacts, poorly drawn, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, grain, grainy, out of focus, signatures
